title: Patriot Structures
description: Adds over twenty new structures into the game to explore and loot.
body:
Current Features:
- Overworld, ~~Nether~~ & End structure spawning
- Allows for as many modular packs as a player installs
- To locate structure, do **/locate structure thepa:[STRUCTURE_NAME]**

Extra loot underground and in the sky

**List of structures**
- Random Bushes
- Camping Outpost
- End Dungeon + Large End Crystals
- Farm (basically an improved village)
- Lone House
- Lost precious blocks (cave feature)
- Mega Tree + Treehouse
- Mega Red and Brown Mushrooms
- Custom Ruined portals at the bottom of the ocean
- Ocean Vents
- Palm trees
- Sky Loot Islands
- Custom Towers
- Big Skull
- Villager Boat
- Huge Mossy Rock
- Wandering Wagon
